projects.name: Bruno
projects.description: Bruno is a local-only, Git-friendly, and open-source API client built for modern developers. Unlike other tools that rely on cloud-based collaboration, Bruno leverages Git to enable seamless sharing and version control of API collections. We're rethinking the API client experience by focusing solely on what matters—providing a fast, lightweight, and focused tool without the unnecessary bloat that comes with bundled platforms.
projects.short_description: Bruno is a Git-integrated, fully offline, and open-source API client

form.question: How to support
form.response: Give Bruno a spin and drop us your feedback. It’s the simplest and most impactful way to support the project.

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: Bruno is a local-only, Git-friendly, and open-source API client built for modern developers. Unlike other tools that rely on cloud-based collaboration, Bruno leverages Git to enable seamless sharing and version control of API collections. We're rethinking the API client experience by focusing solely on what matters—providing a fast, lightweight, and focused tool without the unnecessary bloat that comes with bundled platforms.

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: I love building things. And with Bruno, it’s even more fulfilling to see developers love what we make.

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
form.response: We don't talk about Bruno, no, no, no We don't talk about Bruno But it was my wedding day (it was our wedding day) We were getting ready, and there wasn't a cloud in the sky (No clouds allowed in the sky) Bruno walks in with a mischievous grin (thunder) You're telling this story, or am I? This is from the movie Encanto.

form.question: Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
form.response: I was fed up with bloated API clients and their cloud-based approach to collaboration. All I wanted was something fast, minimal, and Git-native for managing API collections. So I built it myself.

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
